scripts.build: npm --workspace @kamilio/wire run build && npm --workspace wire-core run build && npm --workspace provider-asana run build && npm --workspace provider-chatgpt run build && npm --workspace provider-gmail run build && npm --workspace provider-google-docs run build && npm --workspace provider-notion run build && npm --workspace provider-slack run build && npm --workspace provider-zoom run build && npm --workspace wire-vscode-extension run build
scripts.typecheck: npm run build && npm --workspace wire-core run typecheck && npm --workspace provider-asana run typecheck && npm --workspace provider-chatgpt run typecheck && npm --workspace provider-gmail run typecheck && npm --workspace provider-google-docs run typecheck && npm --workspace provider-notion run typecheck && npm --workspace provider-slack run typecheck && npm --workspace provider-zoom run typecheck && npm --workspace @kamilio/wire run typecheck && npm --workspace wire-vscode-extension run typecheck
